subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Great Name! Thy letter was received and studied with the utmost care. According as thou didst wish [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده اسم اعظم نامه شما وصول یافت و بکمال دقت مطالعه گردید چنانکه آرزو
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
